name: Spark
description: A focused bolt of crackling force.

name: Ember Lance
description: A fan of burning embers that scorches nearby enemies.

name: Second Wind
description: Channel calm focus to recover vigor.
support_context: Steady focus settles over you, sharpening your breath and resolve.

name: Mending Light
description: Seal wounds with a gentle restorative pulse.
support_context: A gentle radiance surrounds you, easing pain and sealing your wounds.

name: Clarity
description: Draw ambient ether to replenish mana reserves.
support_context: Ambient ether gathers around you, restoring your arcane focus.

name: Restoration Surge
description: A sudden restorative pulse that immediately heals your wounds.
support_context: A sudden wave of restorative light surges through you, mending injuries at once.
